subject: Urgent Request: Backend Developer – PHP
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the healthcare sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Backend Developer with strong experience in PHP. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • PHP
  • Kubernetes
  • Cassandra
  • Kafka

Details:
Client: NordHealth
Start: 2024-01-07
Duration: 12 months
Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
Rate: up to 925 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Maja Gustafsson
Tech Talent Specialist
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 72 122 34 56
